backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing social media features including posts, comments, stories, notifications, user profiles, likes, and Stripe subscription integration with access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features for Home.tsx including feed fetching, auto-refresh polling, comments display, comment input forms, and comment submission functionality with associated test IDs and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing components, pages, and hooks including authentication, posts, stories, reels, subscriptions, and payment flows.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme color schemes including primary, secondary, accent, destructive, and sidebar color definitions.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Caffeine Social application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, profile, subscribe, stories, reels, and payment pages, wrapped in ThemeProvider and Layout with AuthGuard.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Authorization component that checks admin status using useIsCallerAdmin hook and displays access denied message or renders children based on permissions.
frontend/src/components/AuthGuard.tsx: Authentication guard component that enforces login requirement, shows loading states, displays login prompt for unauthenticated users, and triggers ProfileSetupModal for new users without profiles.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Displays a collapsible list of comments for a post with avatar, author, timestamp, and content. Provides a form to add new comments with authentication check and handles sorting by creation time.
frontend/src/components/CreatePostForm.t: Form component for creating posts with text content and optional image media (up to 10MB). Handles file preview, upload progress tracking, and submission with validation.
Dialog-based form for creating 24-hour stories with required image media (up to 10MB). Includes file preview, upload progress, and expiration configuration.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component with navbar, content area, and footer containing Caffeine.ai attribution link. Uses React Router's Outlet for nested routes.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that toggles between login and logout states using Internet Identity. Clears query cache on logout and handles authentication errors.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with logo, navigation links (Home, Stories, Reels, Profile, Subscribe), notification bell, username display, and login button. Includes mobile menu with hamburger toggle.
frontend/src/components/NotificationBell: Dropdown notification center displaying unread count badge, notification list with types (like, comment, follow), and mark-as-read functionality. Shows relative timestamps and scrollable content area.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a social media post card with author info, content, optional media, like/comment buttons, and expandable comment section. Handles like interactions and shows user-specific badges.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new user onboarding that collects username and email to create a user profile. Prevents closing until profile is created.
frontend/src/components/ReelPlayer.tsx: Video player component for short-form reels with auto-play on scroll, play/pause controls, like button, and overlay UI showing author info and engagement stats.
frontend/src/components/StoryViewer.tsx: Full-screen story viewer with auto-advancing progress bars, tap navigation, and view tracking. Stories auto-advance after 7 seconds.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetup.tsx: Admin-only component for configuring Stripe payment integration by entering secret key and allowed country codes. Only shown when Stripe is not yet configured.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializes access control with admin token, and invalidates dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddComment.ts: Mutation hook for adding comments to posts, invalidates comment and feed queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCheckoutSess: Mutation hook for creating Stripe checkout sessions with shopping items and redirect URLs, returns session ID and checkout URL.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePost.ts: Mutation hook for creating new posts with content and optional media, invalidates feed query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateStory.ts: Mutation hook for creating stories with media and expiration time, invalidates active stories query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetActiveStories.t: Query hook that fetches currently active (non-expired) stories, refreshes every minute.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile, returns null if no profile exists.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetComments.ts: Query hook that fetches all comments for a specific post by post ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetFeed.ts: React Query hook that fetches the user's feed (array of PostView) from the backend actor when available.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetNotifications.t: React Query hook that fetches notifications from the backend actor with 30-second polling interval.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and provider with login, logout, and identity management using DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: React Query hook that checks if the current caller has admin privileges via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsStripeConfigured: React Query hook that checks if Stripe payment configuration is set up in the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useLikePost.ts: React Query mutation hook for liking a post that invalidates the feed cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useMarkNotificationAs: React Query mutation hook for marking a notification as read that invalidates the notifications cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook for saving user profile data that invalidates the current user profile cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetStripeConfigura: React Query mutation hook for setting Stripe configuration that invalidates the Stripe configured status cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscribeUser.ts: React Query mutation hook for subscribing a user to premium that invalidates the current user profile cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useViewStory.ts: React Query mutation hook for recording a story view that invalidates the active stories cache on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for light/dark themes using oklch color space and Inter font family.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component that displays a feed of posts with comments, handles adding comments, and refreshes every 5 seconds.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Payment failure page displaying an error message with options to retry payment or return home.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Payment success page that triggers user subscription update on mount and displays success confirmation with navigation to profile.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: User profile page displaying avatar, username, subscription status, post statistics, and a list of the user's posts.
frontend/src/pages/Reels.tsx: Reels page that filters posts with video media, displays them in a full-screen vertical scroll container with snap scrolling, and tracks the currently visible reel index to control playback via ReelPlayer component.
frontend/src/pages/Stories.tsx: Stories page that displays active stories in a horizontal scrollable list and grid layout, with a floating create button and StoryViewer modal that opens when a story is clicked.
frontend/src/pages/Subscribe.tsx: Subscribe page that displays free vs premium plan comparison, checks Stripe configuration status, and initiates Stripe checkout session for $9.99/month premium subscription with redirect handling.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and methods to clear parameters from URLs and storage.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system, extended theme for container queries, typography, animations (accordion), and custom utilities for shadows and border radius using CSS variables.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining a social media app architecture using Internet Computer backend, React frontend, Internet Identity auth, IPFS storage, Stripe payments, and listing implemented features for posts, stories, reels, subscriptions, and UI components.
